name: Emotional Learning Spotlight
purpose: Highlight one story-based emotional learning use case with concrete value.

layout_guidance.eyebrow_role: Signal the use case or emotional theme.
layout_guidance.headline_role: State the practical emotional outcome, not the feature.
body_pattern: Name the emotional or classroom moment.
Show how a personalized story helps the child process it.
Invite the recipient to choose or create the story.
